expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus is NOT DEMONSTRATED: it notes available evidence only confirms the feature topic ("Support data label for each slice in Donut chart") and lacks any requirements/behaviors for "Visibility rules", "Density behavior", or "Overlap handling". execution_notes.md also states it "cannot verify the benchmark’s required nuance" due to missing Phase 4a artifacts.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md marks Phase 4a alignment as NOT DEMONSTRATED because "No Phase 4a output artifact is present" (e.g., no drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r1.md) and therefore Phase 4a constraints cannot be verified. execution_notes.md reiterates: "No Phase 4a run artifacts were provided".
